rows.strict_supervisor_conclusion: Window 007 is no longer policy-only. It already shows broad preheat confirmation with both formal/industrial names and emotion-mirror names responding together. Still, it should remain below final training because the cleaner January ignition archetype is handled by window 002.

interpretation: Window 007 is now evidence-backed as a policy-preheat window with real board confirmation and early-ignition characteristics.
It should teach early policy-backed ignition formation rather than replace the cleaner January ignition archetype.
This keeps 007 useful as a positive preheat sample while still preventing it from overruling window 002.
